title: Data consistency problem of query results in the latest release of Monetdb (Remote Table)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE AMI_test_extended (toc_no VARCHAR(255), mesure_de INT, description VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'No description');
INSERT INTO AMI_test_extended (toc_no, mesure_de, description) VALUES ('A000000017', 20201014, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO AMI_test_extended (toc_no, mesure_de, description) VALUES ('A000000018', NULL, 'Second entry with NULL mesure_de');
SELECT * FROM AMI_test_extended WHERE mesure_de IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mesure_de ASC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AMI_test_extended WHERE mesure_de < 20201010 AND description LIKE 'First%';
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results from remote table selection
